forecastMetrics.title: Projected IT-Enabled Revenue Growth
forecastMetrics.insight: Based on current trajectory and planned digital initiatives, revenue attribution is projected to reach €3.1B by Q4 2025, driven by APAC expansion and AI-driven sales optimization.

forecastMetrics.title: Projected Cost Avoidance
forecastMetrics.insight: Automation and cloud optimization initiatives are expected to increase cost avoidance to €250M annually, with RPA and AIOps contributing the largest share.

forecastMetrics.title: Projected Innovation ROI
forecastMetrics.insight: Innovation ROI is forecast to reach 340% as AI/ML models scale across supply chain and customer service domains, with quantum computing pilots beginning to show early returns.

forecastMetrics.title: Projected AI/ML Models in Production
forecastMetrics.insight: With the AI Center of Excellence expansion, production AI/ML models are projected to grow to 85 by end of year, focusing on computer vision, NLP, and predictive analytics.

forecastMetrics.title: Projected Cybersecurity Maturity
forecastMetrics.insight: Zero-trust architecture rollout and enhanced threat detection are expected to push cybersecurity maturity to 94/100, exceeding industry benchmarks.

forecastMetrics.title: Projected System Availability
forecastMetrics.insight: Infrastructure redundancy upgrades and AI-driven incident prevention are forecast to achieve 99.99% availability, representing near-zero downtime.

forecastMetrics.title: Projected Digital Transformation Progress
forecastMetrics.insight: Cloud migration and legacy modernization efforts are on track to reach 92% completion, with Tier 1 applications fully migrated by Q3 2025.

forecastMetrics.title: Projected Sustainability Index
forecastMetrics.insight: Data center efficiency programs and green IT initiatives are projected to raise the sustainability index to 90.5%, with carbon footprint reduction exceeding 35% year-over-year.

optimistic.label: Optimistic
optimistic.description: Accelerated digital transformation with full AI/ML adoption across all business units

baseline.label: Baseline
baseline.description: Current trajectory maintained with planned initiatives on schedule

conservative.label: Conservative
conservative.description: Delayed initiatives and budget constraints limiting transformation pace

keyRisks.description: Talent shortage in AI/ML and cybersecurity domains may delay projected timelines
keyRisks.mitigation: Accelerate upskilling programs and expand partnerships with universities

keyRisks.description: Regulatory changes in data sovereignty could impact cloud migration plans
keyRisks.mitigation: Proactive engagement with regulatory bodies and flexible architecture design

keyRisks.description: Economic uncertainty may reduce innovation budget allocation
keyRisks.mitigation: Focus on high-ROI initiatives and build business cases with clear value metrics

keyRisks.description: Vendor lock-in risk with strategic partners could limit flexibility
keyRisks.mitigation: Multi-vendor strategy and open standards adoption in architecture decisions
